rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 1 - CROSS DEFENDANT CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to allege contractual objection and its breach. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC VS. CHINESE GOURMET GROUP INC.,
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memo Of P&A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 1 - PLAINTIFF CHICO MALL INVESTORS LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings. Deny judgment on the pleadings. Answer sufficient and motion does nothing to advance case. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Pltf'S Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 2 - PLAINTIFF SBERLO FAMILY TRUST's Motion To Amend First Amended Complaint. Grant to file amended complaint adding declaratory relief and adding names. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 2 - DEFENDANT TANYA PHILLIPS' Motion For Leave To File Cross Complaint. Grant motion to file cross complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RALAN WONG VS. TIFFANY BARBER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 3 - DEFENDANT TIFFANY BARBER, SARAH SHARAF and MATT PINNA's MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. Deny - (1) complaint sufficiently alleges plaintiff informed defendant of grounds of eviction on date of notice. (2) plaintiff met applicable provision of rent ordinance. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1021 YORK LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY VS. LAURA CERVANTES et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 2, 2012, line 4- DEFENDANT LAURA CERVANTES MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny - verification by director sufficient. =(501/REQ)
